title: BITS Pilani Recruitment 2026 - Apply for Junior Research Fellow Posts
description: Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Junior Research Fellow Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the M.E/ M.Tech in Chemical Engineering, M.Sc., can grab this chance and apply for the BITS Pilani Recruitment 202 6 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested candidates can apply bef...
